name: mcp-server-paypal
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI models to interact with PayPal Apis.

rating.reason: The toolset shows adequate documentation with clear tool names and basic functionality descriptions, but suffers from inconsistent quality and verbose descriptions that could be more concise. While most tools have clear purposes and reasonable parameter documentation, some tools like 'create_product' and 'create_subscription_plan' have overly lengthy descriptions with unnecessary payload examples. Parameter documentation is generally adequate but inconsistent in detail level across tools. The naming is appropriate and functional throughout.
